---
title: "Noticing Alcohol Scripts"
format: html
---

# Rewriting Alcohol Scripts

Once alcohol scripts are identified<!--reference alcohol_script_1.qmd-->, they can be *challenged and rewritten*. Not all thoughts are facts. Many are learned patterns.

By consciously replacing unhelpful scripts with realistic, recovery-supportive ones, you can change both your emotional response and your behavior in high-risk situations.


![](https://github.com/jjcurtin/aud_support/blob/main/modules/images/quill.jpg?raw=true){fig-align="center"}


## Evaluate an alcohol-related thought and create a healthier alternative below
